title: Exporting your data and downloading account information
content: You can export your data at any time to keep a personal copy or move it elsewhere. From the Privacy or Data section of your account settings, request an export and choose the format you need. We will compile your information and email you a secure download link when it is ready, which may take a few minutes for larger accounts. The link expires after a set period, so be sure to download your file promptly.
